CVE-2025-40905.title: WWW::OAuth 1.000 and earlier for Perl uses the rand() function as ...
CVE-2025-40905.description: WWW::OAuth 1.000 and earlier for Perl uses the rand() function as the default source of entropy, which is not cryptographically secure, for cryptographic functions.
